messages.content: I spiraled before my team presentation.
What thoughts showed up right before the spiral?
That everyone would think I am incompetent.

json.transcript: Client: I spiraled before my team presentation.\nTherapist: What thoughts showed up right before the spiral?\nClient: That everyone would think I am incompetent.

current_memory.memory_text: Aarav experiences anticipatory anxiety before public speaking and tends to catastrophize peer judgment.

recent_case_notes.phase_progress: Can identify automatic thoughts but struggles to challenge them independently
